title: State-Space Model Forecasting Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the recursive process of exact forecasting using the State-Space Model formulation, showing the interplay between the state prediction and update steps.
relationships: State Estimate at time t is used to predict the state at t+1
State Prediction is updated with the new observation via the Kalman Gain to form a new State Estimate
The predicted state is used to forecast the next observation
